## What part of the spec

<!-- Section number from AGENT_REPORTING_PROFILE.md (e.g. §4.1, §5.3) or "general README" -->

## Issue type

- [ ] Clarity — the wording is ambiguous or incomplete
- [ ] Schema — the JSON Schema disagrees with the prose
- [ ] Conformance level — propose adding/removing a required field at L0–L4
- [ ] New primitive — propose extending the spec
- [ ] Correctness — found a bug or contradiction

## What you expected vs what you found

<!-- One paragraph. Concrete examples beat abstract descriptions. -->

## Proposed change

<!-- If you have one. Optional. PRs welcome for typo/clarity fixes. -->

## Upstream alignment check

primitive, link the upstream spec section. ARP must adopt upstream
shape rather than introduce a parallel one. -->
